name: Golf VX North Dartmouth
address: 127 Faunce Corner Rd, North Dartmouth, MA 02747
about: Golf VX North Dartmouth is an indoor golf simulator venue that provides premier golf experiences year-round, regardless of weather. The facility features six high-quality simulators with realistic terrain, moving swing plates, and AI swing analysis. It offers a complete experience with simulator rentals, golf leagues, lessons, and food and beverage service in a comfortable lounge environment. The venue is suitable for golfers of all ages and skill levels, with special programs for juniors and private events, making it a versatile alternative to traditional golf courses.
why_golfers_like_it: Realistic T2 platform with 380+ real courses and near-zero lag
Moving hitting surface and auto tee for an authentic experience
PGA-certified instructors with advanced swing analysis technology
Comfortable lounge atmosphere with full food and beverage service
Weatherproof golf available year-round in climate-controlled bays

food_and_drink.notes: Full food menu available for dine-in and events
Full-service golf bar on-site serving handcrafted cocktails and drinks

simulator_hardware.notes: 6 simulators with moving hitting surface, auto tee, and near-zero lag

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, we provide top-tier clubs and simulator gear for players. However, you can also bring your own.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, we offer a full food and beverage menu on-site with handcrafted cocktails and a complete food menu.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Rounds are fast and authentic on the T2 platform, with no specific time mentioned but noted for efficiency.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer golf programs for all ages and levels, including junior clinics, making it suitable for kids.
